summary: Stellar soundboard capture of a solid set with a soaring Touch opener, a fiery Friend of the Devil and a powerful Other One, despite a rocky Corrina and Stranger.
review: The recording is praised for its crystal‑clear mix and excellent sound quality, typical of a high‑grade soundboard source. Musically the show delivers strong moments – an inspired Touch opener, a killer Friend of the Devil and a standout The Other One – while the first appearance of Corrina, Corrina and a tentative Stranger expose some uncertainty in the band.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews overwhelmingly highlight superb sound quality and several standout performances; only minor musical hiccups are noted, resulting in a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call the mix ‘stellar’, ‘great sound’ and note the recording as crisp and high‑fidelity with no reported dropouts or noise issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set opens strongly with Touch; second set is largely solid and seamless despite a shaky start on Corrina and some uncertainty during Stranger, showing the band regrouping as Phil pulls them forward.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil is highlighted as pulling the rest of the band and really shining in the second set.
